summary: Completed testing of bug fixes for iteration 85. All backend API tests pass (14/14). Fixed a bug in /api/trade/logs endpoint where direction field was required but some trade logs had null values. Frontend UI tests verified: Login flow, Admin Members page with simulation, Trading Signals page with email sending, and Profit Tracker page all working correctly.

minor.issue: FIXED - direction field was required but some trade logs had null values. Made direction Optional in TradeLogResponse model.

critical_code_review_comments: Email sending function (send_signal_email_to_members) correctly uses send_email from email_service - fix verified
refreshUser function in AuthContext correctly fetches fresh user data from /auth/me endpoint
Onboarding completion handler correctly calls refreshUser(), loadData(), and window.location.reload() for robust data refresh
Simulation flow in AdminMembersPage correctly passes memberId to simulateMemberView context
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Made direction field Optional in TradeLogResponse model (line 200)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) Email sending uses correct send_email function from email_service, 2) refreshUser function properly refreshes user data, 3) Onboarding completion handler includes page reload for mobile bug fix, 4) Simulation flow correctly passes memberId. Fixed a minor bug where /api/trade/logs was failing due to null direction values in some trade logs.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TradeLogResponse model had direction as required string, but some trade logs in database had null direction values
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed direction: str to direction: Optional[str] = None

verified_fixes.bug: Email not sending when marking a trading signal as official
verified_fixes.status: VERIFIED - send_signal_email_to_members function correctly uses send_email from email_service

verified_fixes.bug: Mobile onboarding bug - account value doesn't update
verified_fixes.status: VERIFIED - onboarding completion handler calls refreshUser(), loadData(), and window.location.reload()
VERIFIED - simulateMemberView correctly receives memberId from member details
